---
title: "Service & Consulting"
---

## Consulting

I periodically provide consulting services in psychometrics, measurement, and people analytics for public and private organizations in Chile and abroad. Past and ongoing consulting includes psychometric advisory work for the [Agencia de Calidad de la Educación](https://www.agenciaeducacion.cl/), the agency currently responsible for Chile's [SIMCE](https://simce.cl/) national assessments.

## Service

I regularly serve as a peer reviewer for several international journals.

### Professional Memberships

- Sociedad Chilena de Psicología y Comportamiento Organizacional (SOCIPCO)
- American Psychological Association (APA), Division 5 (Quantitative and Qualitative Methods)
- National Council on Measurement in Education (NCME)

## Academic & Professional Appointments

### Current

- **Department Chair**, Department of Management, [Facultad de Administración y Economía](https://administracionyeconomia.udp.cl/), [Universidad Diego Portales](https://www.udp.cl/) (2023–present)
- **Program Director**, Magíster en Dirección de Personas, [Facultad de Administración y Economía](https://administracionyeconomia.udp.cl/), [Universidad Diego Portales](https://www.udp.cl/) (2024–present)
- **Member**, Statistical Advisory Board, [Examen Único Nacional de Conocimientos de Medicina (EUNACOM)](https://www.eunacom.cl/) — a national licensing examination for medical graduates in Chile (2019–present)

### Former

- **Director of Undergraduate Studies**, [Facultad de Administración y Economía](https://administracionyeconomia.udp.cl/), [Universidad Diego Portales](https://www.udp.cl/)
- **Academic Secretary**, Escuela de Ingeniería Comercial, [Facultad de Administración y Economía](https://administracionyeconomia.udp.cl/), [Universidad Diego Portales](https://www.udp.cl/)
- **Psychometrics Advisor**, [Unidad de Currículum y Evaluación](https://www.curriculumnacional.cl/), Ministerio de Educación, Chile
- **Coordinator**, Measurement Unit, [SIMCE](https://simce.cl/) — Chile's national student assessment system
- **Senior Psychometrician**, [SIMCE](https://simce.cl/)
